sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκτείνω

- Transliteration: Ekteino

- Phonetic: ek-ti'-no

- Definition:

1. to stretch out, stretch forth

a. over, towards, against one

- Origin: from G1537 and teino (to stretch)

- TDNT entry: 09:40,2

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and τείνω teinō (to stretch); to extend: - cast put forth stretch forth (out).
